form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.72) at Warragul in a Rank Limit - Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 8 lengths. Has three wins and three placings from eight starts from the draw. Among the main chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (26.72) at Warragul in a Rank Limit - Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 8 lengths. Has three wins and three placings from eight starts from the draw. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (29.03) at this track over 510m. Has the ability to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (29.03) at this track over 510m. Has the ability to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Warragul to win by a neck in 27.07, beating Bengal Beast. Last start finished 6th over 435m at this track beaten 6 lengths (24.95) behind Paw Varna in a Grade 5 on April 5. Others preferred on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at Warragul to win by a neck in 27.07, beating Bengal Beast. Last start finished 6th over 435m at this track beaten 6 lengths (24.95) behind Paw Varna in a Grade 5 on April 5. Others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th on April 7 over 460m at Warragul behind Paw Fable beaten 1.75 lengths (25.97) in a Restricted WIN H. Has run blistering time here with a 28.64 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th on April 7 over 460m at Warragul behind Paw Fable beaten 1.75 lengths (25.97) in a Restricted WIN H. Has run blistering time here with a 28.64 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 7 over 485m at Horsham behind Happy Dad beaten 7 lengths (27.85) in a Restricted WIN. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 510m at this track. This looks too tough.

formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 510m at this track. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.40) when sixth over 515m at Sandown in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd over 515m at Sandown beaten 5.5 lengths (30.01) behind Paw Nimbus in a Grade 5 on April 9. Leading contender.
